channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Colombian Footballer Faces Safety Concerns After World Cup Exit
item.description: Colombian footballer Jaminton Campaz has decided not to return to his home country following Colombia's elimination from the 2026 World Cup qualifiers. The striker received death threats, prompting hi...

item.title: British-Zimbabwean suspect faces South African court after arrest in Johannesburg
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, a British-Zimbabwean man wanted in the UK for allegedly murdering his wife and two daughters, is set to appear in a South African court following his arrest in Johannesburg. ...

item.title: UN Warns of Catastrophic Consequences from US-Iran Strikes
item.description: The United Nations secretary-general, António Guterres, has urged restraint from all parties involved in escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, warning of imminent 'catastrophic conse...

item.title: Tommy Robinson's Moscow Trip Funded by Musk's Foundation Sparks Controversy Over Right-Wing Ties to Russia
item.description: British right-wing activist Tommy Robinson has faced renewed scrutiny after revelations he travelled to Moscow with funding from Elon Musk's family foundation, coinciding with his growing association ...

item.title: India mourns former Qatar emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al-Thani with national day of mourning
item.description: India has announced a national day of mourning to honor the late Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al-Thani, the former Emir of Qatar who passed away recently. The decision reflects the deep respect and diplom...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Threatens Retaliation Following Father's Killing
item.description: The article discusses Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public vow of revenge following the killing of his father, which has sparked international concern. The leader's statements emphasi...

item.title: OAIC's Role in Promoting Unity and Nation Building in Nigeria
item.description: The Organisation of African Instituted Churches (OAIC) has played a significant role in fostering unity and nation-building in Nigeria by bridging ethnic, cultural, and religious divides. Through gras...

item.title: B.C. Researchers Explore Wild Yeast to Revitalize Craft Brewing Industry
item.description: Researchers at Langara College and the University of British Columbia are studying wild yeast collected from across B.C. and the Pacific Northwest to develop new beer flavors while reducing costs for ...

item.title: Man Sentenced to Manslaughter Over Debt Dispute with Friend
item.description: A close friendship turned deadly when Mr Ally Athumani was found guilty of manslaughter after a disagreement over Sh18,000 debt led to his friend Mr Aidan Daudi's death. The High Court in Kigoma reduc...

item.title: Grade 4 student passes away following deworming procedure at Cavite school
item.description: A Grade 4 student from Trece Martires City died after undergoing a deworming activity at Hugo Perez Elementary School-Annex in Cavite. The Department of Education (DepEd) confirmed the incident, expre...

item.title: Hosepipe Ban Impacts Four Million Customers in London and South East Starting Friday
item.description: Affinity Water has announced the implementation of a hosepipe ban across parts of London and the South East starting at 1am on Friday. This measure, which marks the first such restriction in three dec...

item.title: Federal Agency Deploys Cybersecurity Sensors in Northern Territories to Combat Cyber Threats
item.description: The Communications Security Establishment (CSE) has deployed cybersecurity sensors across northern Canada's territorial government networks, aiming to detect and prevent malicious cyber activity. The ...

item.title: 18th-Century Shipwreck Uncovered with Well-Preserved 18th-Century Cargo
item.description: A remarkable 18th-century shipwreck was discovered in the Skagerrak Strait off Norway's southeastern coast, containing an exceptionally well-preserved cargo of undamaged Chinese porcelain, chandeliers...

item.title: Rachel Ruto’s Female Bodyguard Commended for Vigilance at Wedding
item.description: First Lady Rachel Ruto attended a high-profile wedding reception where she was filmed dancing through the crowd in a vibrant patterned outfit. Her female bodyguard, dressed in a black suit, stayed glu...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Dies After Ignoring Medical Advice, Report Indicates
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) died of a sudden illness, according to his office, which cited a 'brief and sudden illness' as the cause. A new Axios report suggests Graham dismissed medical advice...

item.title: Iran and US escalate Gulf conflict over control of vital shipping route
item.description: Iran and the US have escalated military tensions in the Gulf, with Iran launching missile and drone strikes against US facilities across the region. The attacks, which include targeting Qatar and the ...

item.title: Celebrities attend England vs Norway World Cup game: Stars cheer on Three Lions
item.description: The article details the attendance of various celebrities at the England vs Norway World Cup quarter-final match. Notable figures such as Jude Bellingham's girlfriend Ashlyn Castro, Harry Kane's wife ...

item.title: Philippines reinforces role in upholding international maritime law through defense partnerships
item.description: The Department of National Defense (DND) Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. emphasized the Philippines' emergence as a global convergence hub for upholding international law, particularly the United Natio...

item.title: Conor McGregor Sustains Leg Injury in UFC Return, Ends Fight After 1 Minute
item.description: Conor McGregor's highly anticipated return to the UFC ended in disaster after sustaining a severe leg injury just 1 minute into his main event bout against Max Holloway at UFC 329. The former two-divi...

item.title: Understanding the Limitations and Cost-Benefit of Crypto Escrow Services
item.description: This article examines the practical limitations of crypto escrow services, emphasizing that while they provide security for payments, they do not guarantee quality or the integrity of the counterparty...
